title: psychotria racemosa
intro: Psychotria racemosa, also known as Jamaica dogwood, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and sedative effects. The health benefits of Jamaica dogwood include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and muscle spasms, as well as pain management and fever reduction. Jamaica dogwood can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is sometimes used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
